capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an authentication service?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have an authentication service?

questions.prompt: Is the authentication service reviewed frequently to measure its efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the authentication service reviewed frequently to measure its efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formal system that authenticates subjects to network and applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formal system that authenticates subjects to network and applications?
questions.evaluation_focus: Formal authentication system for network and applications

questions.prompt: Is the same authentication system used to provide authentication services across the enterprise—for example accessing via VPN, LAN, or cloud—or do separate locations have their own authentication systems?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the same authentication system used to provide authentication services across the enterprise—for example accessing via VPN, LAN, or cloud—or do separate locations have their own authentication systems?

questions.prompt: Does the authentication service configuration get reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the authentication service configuration get reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Does the authentication system integrate with other access control mechanisms like decision makers and enforcement points to provide contextual and identity-centric access?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the authentication system integrate with other access control mechanisms like decision makers and enforcement points to provide contextual and identity-centric access?
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with access control decision and enforcement points

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an IAM engineer to configure the authentication policies on the authentication system?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have an IAM engineer to configure the authentication policies on the authentication system?
questions.evaluation_focus: IAM engineer for authentication policy configuration

questions.prompt: If the authentication service is siloed across locations, does the IAM engineer centrally manage the entire IAM infrastructure, or do separate locations have different IAM engineers?
questions.intent: Evaluate if the authentication service is siloed across locations, does the IAM engineer centrally manage the entire IAM infrastructure, or do separate locations have different IAM engineers?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the authentication service?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the authentication service?

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for authentication reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate are the KPIs and KRIs for authentication reviewed frequently?

capability_questions.capability_name: Subject and Object Authentication with robust multi factor authentication

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formally utilize MFA for authentication?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise formally utilize MFA for authentication?

questions.prompt: Is MFA used as a second factor authentication for all access to the enterprise, including LAN, VPN, cloud, application access, and PAM?
questions.intent: Evaluate is MFA used as a second factor authentication for all access to the enterprise, including LAN, VPN, cloud, application access, and PAM?

questions.prompt: Are MFA configurations reviewed frequently for improvements?
questions.intent: Evaluate are MFA configurations reviewed frequently for improvements?

capability_questions.capability_name: Subject and Object Authentication with passwordless authentication (certificates, biometric (FIDO compliant))

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document passwordless methodologies for authentication?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise formalize and document passwordless methodologies for authentication?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy passwordless authentication across the enterprise, or is it deployed in specific scopes within the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise deploy passwordless authentication across the enterprise, or is it deployed in specific scopes within the enterprise?

questions.prompt: Are passwordless methods reviewed to enhance possible passwordless deployments?
questions.intent: Evaluate are passwordless methods reviewed to enhance possible passwordless deployments?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document phishing-resistant MFA for authentication?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise formalize and document phishing-resistant MFA for authentication?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy phishing-resistant MFA across the enterprise, or is it deployed in specific scopes within the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise deploy phishing-resistant MFA across the enterprise, or is it deployed in specific scopes within the enterprise?
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide vs scoped phishing-resistant MFA deployment

questions.prompt: Are phishing-resistant MFA deployments and designs reviewed to enhance possible improvements to authentication?
questions.intent: Evaluate are phishing-resistant MFA deployments and designs reviewed to enhance possible improvements to authentication?
questions.evaluation_focus: Phishing-resistant MFA design review and enhancement

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for logging authentication events, such as user lifecycle and failed authentications, to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate is there a formal documented process for logging authentication events, such as user lifecycle and failed authentications, to the SOC?

questions.prompt: Is logging of authentication events made securely to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate is logging of authentication events made securely to the SOC?
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure authentication event logging to SOC

questions.prompt: Are dynamic changes to authentication captured and transferred to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate are dynamic changes to authentication captured and transferred to the SOC?
